action.reasoning: Observation: 6-epoch ViT-B/16 AugReg is now the best verified model at 0.1839 Quickdraw accuracy, and local val loading is fixed. Analysis: only ~0.71 hours remain, and the last gain from 4->6 epochs was tiny (+0.00033), so additional training is unlikely to beat the current best within budget. The highest-value action is to resubmit the proven best checkpoint with the stable predict.py to bank the final score, then stop. Decision: submit checkpoints/vit_6ep/best.pt as final and end the experiment.
action.done_reason: Best known checkpoint is ViT-B/16 AugReg 6-epoch at 0.1839 Quickdraw accuracy; remaining time is too low for a meaningful new training run, so finalizing with the strongest verified submission.
